title: Day 18 Reflection
description: Solidify auth patterns before the admin dashboard tomorrow.

prompts.question: Where did you store the JWT and why? What are the tradeoffs?
Did you hit a redirect loop or auth flash? How did you fix it?
How does prepareHeaders connect Day 17 RTK Query to today's auth?
prompts.guidance: Trace token from login to API call.

prompts.question: Explain authentication vs authorization with examples from your app.
What role-based UI will you add on Day 19?
